overview.description: The PGIM Short Duration Multi-Sector Bond ETF (PSDM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in broad credit fixed income. The fund is an actively managed fund that holds a broad range of fixed income instruments with any credit rating, duration, and maturity, while targeting a weighted average maturity of less than or equal to five years. Securities are selected using both top-down analysis and bottom-up research. PSDM was launched on Jul 19, 2023 and is issued by PGIM.
